{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321130429A40BCE8D632F1F2667AA"}"},"total":2797},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7253037056845660962","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这边书我看完了，虽然有很多地方不严谨，但也很不错了，男主和女主之间看的很舒服，不像某些书打个单女主标签搞暧昧，男女主也都很强，书里的部分配角也刻画的很好。
剧情的话属于正常水准，很经典的装杯打脸，有时候会刻意的扮猪吃虎，总体剧情还是没问题的，结局的话有些仓促。
我比较喜欢看男女主之间的发展，总是男主单调的变强是无味了，加上女主和感情这个调味料，男女主一起变强，看的就比较舒服了，男女主也都不是圣母，对待手下朋友也很不错。","text_exts":[{"e":109,"s":105,"text":"扮猪吃虎","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%89%AE%E7%8C%AA%E5%90%83%E8%99%8E&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317740694691F2667AA%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227253037056845660962%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227030433556048382979%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%89%AE%E7%8C%AA%E5%90%83%E8%99%8E%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1688729350,"group_id":"7030433556048382979","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"从前从前有个人爱我很久","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nwfz94UX6VVsoRImuUQGgKVKkSOJyHyA3K3QQLk9ANSn","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/caad28b0eb774a0e9a89bb670f3c52b2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776618996&x-signature=qstQUHC0Z%2BKQgFIKreJGYe923zQ%3D","user_id":"1042801260504824","user_name":"幽蝶梦一场"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1042801260504824","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7030433556048382979","book_info":{"abstract":"简介：【玄幻+系统+单女主】
白龙穿越了，本以为可以一路高歌猛进，得长生大道，谁曾想系统却给他发布了一个奇葩任务,竟然要他去调戏冰山女帝。
叮！
系统：喜悦值提升100点
系统：奖励神级功法一本、修为连升三级
叮！叮！
系统：喜悦值提升300点
系统：奖励《次元决》、修为连升八级
......
然而有一天，平静的日子被打破了。
